name: Austin Chambers
subject: phone calls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
[](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=K1q7aUCk5jmHu07xO2zzAqckXBp1E8rwxRuNwawnAmNlS7JS3JH7VHaFqiHE3xBN_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23wvUTka9szBY0ewsizGYEbIa3lzvNKxTunp6QgxDao53gHV0qKh-2FWm1u5pzCV81job6bhtYzahJiZGm6vXspoJ0h9FUmLmquBkDU6iUdmoGfmSWBz-2BlTbmNlorLDL4JLNQgal88y9ataW4Hc0RUyxEr39KQbzIKVMQXJvsNCkD4oh0ZUeEJhRb6askX5olp9vgjv0AbBBE1PhaBhIXxV5kxtt-2FW40OqrMUs5gDAHsdKI-2BDeJpcPh8Hke1iDEhNgyRkXoymgxNfpvNYroJ7n0C5I9EIHhNJ-2FBKF0-2B6aXJ7Oy1tZNdtT-2BOQ-2BlmHVPH7-2FDo8qigiehHnk7uBjI1-2FhVUR7lDr3iJcuRAk5kpDUF3xvkuKlOl1yqMGi02ur5RTdqUtwcejzFSj3Uqw9br4hfpTuT)
Peter,
I'll get right to the point: we need your help to win.

This is going to be a close election. Our opponents are already attacking us, and we need your help to fight back.

Next week, we are launching our voter contact phone banking program. We need your commitment to make it successful. Calling your friends and neighbors from a Team Greitens office near you, and letting them know why you support Eric Greitens is one of the best ways to help us win this race. It's really easy-- and fun!

**[Will you commit to making one hour of phone calls per week at the nearest office?](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=K1q7aUCk5jmHu07xO2zzAqckXBp1E8rwxRuNwawnAmNlS7JS3JH7VHaFqiHE3xBN_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23wvUTka9szBY0ewsizGYEbIa3lzvNKxTunp6QgxDao53gHV0qKh-2FWm1u5pzCV81job6bhtYzahJiZGm6vXspoJ0h9FUmLmquBkDU6iUdmoGfmSWBz-2BlTbmNlorLDL4JLNQgal88y9ataW4Hc0RUyxEr39KQbzIKVMQXJvsNCkD4oh0ZUeEJhRb6askX5olp9vjfuUd-2Fv90rCB25FRhIURvUV8SJJhupp-2FAeYBSwRLnwSR8HIEqMQM7JktrwQi-2FYdhV6D5blStrCVPZeSIVoRRqmO5yiMrDLFbDx3DulvRJ4r58UCk1JTIVE5XtP68RelQQtcbsB7SA4Qr1tw3Fffj3PTdCTJmbhUktW3x1v37vMJmcZvO-2BZa7eu0wJuLNFnK7Qqr01Rc-2BAKIoC0d2v-2BLJhg)** _**A one-hour per week commitment will allow you to personally call nearly 1,000 households before the primary.**_ That could be the difference in this election! If I can count on you, please reply to this email, and our team will follow-up with details.

If you can't make it to one of the three offices currently open, stay tuned for details for future openings and the launch of our call-from-home program.

Thank you for everything - with your help, we will win!

On to victory,

AC

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

[Sign up to make calls](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=K1q7aUCk5jmHu07xO2zzAqckXBp1E8rwxRuNwawnAmNlS7JS3JH7VHaFqiHE3xBN_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23wvUTka9szBY0ewsizGYEbIa3lzvNKxTunp6QgxDao53gHV0qKh-2FWm1u5pzCV81job6bhtYzahJiZGm6vXspoJ0h9FUmLmquBkDU6iUdmoGfmSWBz-2BlTbmNlorLDL4JLNQgal88y9ataW4Hc0RUyxEr39KQbzIKVMQXJvsNCkD4oh0ZUeEJhRb6askX5olp9vhnUnLa7yUNxyRXXS2urxPA786THdU9kIyzoqqqeOS4Z-2BEoYx1ARCWF9Kom6paKZp7LyqgVOMo0pVTzdXrJBey3Ml9R1IBMPEXBRbBBpKsCALdbGMLCEbtYGU8qVYh1Lsykc7cXBrjpxtXYd9zPUd-2B5RoCk80WAdVtr8luPkg5wCSpF3JeH3AXgEuRjHfSk1Gj6IBU9BxJ0eLVK0VFimYHj)

Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://links.ericgreitens.com/asm/unsubscribe/?user_id=2167711&data=c_y0qh2MizUkMtvZG5MTLPYTx4N_iyE8b_rLitgpyGYJNyXoFMKxL5qC2u0aRTYCTHV5BDndoL3qPu54db2iUL4-pYupnmeCzaqaxxRhLgL14fBUYgiUWz0bhXtktKIjqu-3k2TIhOtxM9cbe9D5WJCbXLH_SDw-bxfEazPGdNzSnpv83muAd8K2nUA409c85AOiOXaxCD0H-Gzz16wEYH20qMn5Qd03_iONUepCq1ySc1JSIQUBaIyTofVxLWtsIs68hliiKfYQRNIQ20sYv-f2USHY1g1leilh3fx7kgcFaasqKoRDqQLzmlTPhsmhrYgC0oC8QKyksmt1-SyZXsElwnPJWURYeoINPEtL5gysoqIbP22Us1pWBSu-ZNix4LpaZ8GT_KhmkGodycG0V7k0ktzfUZNTwld-bKlEKkYnbkL3cTaVddcRErVb9TSJMv8G4ciZ2DKnUfk-DTGEoKUoF1oPbUQJhn1MxRd3suRIPWJ506q9MuIH2KNBAXs-chPmXMyF6rAHYz0NxCxpWUJwQQOlndzBPB3f9MwX-oxxfemGf_xnJy-nZ04foLfPnnvNTJY5w-TP98wzBnam7DmrGoJ-cN8aaU4wGtNZ5-AiCBVVd9e0U9_T5KvKkKIR), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? name: Team Cruz
subject: TODAY: Ted Cruz on CNN and Fox News
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Today Ted Cruz will
call in to The Lead with Jake Tapper on CNN at 4:45 pm ET. Ted
will also appear on the O'Reilly Factor on Fox News at 8 pm ET --
don't miss either!

We hope you'll tune
in and tell your friends!

For Liberty,
Team Cruz

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system October 8, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Add your name to meet Hillary, George, and Amal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
a really special thank you | Friend --

I tell you all the time how much we love this team, but today, we want to show you how much we appreciate you being on Team Hillary.

For a really special thank you, if you add your name today, you will have a chance to fly to Los Angeles with a guest to hang out with George and Amal Clooney at their home -- you’ll also get to meet Hillary there.

**Are you in?? Add your name right now for a chance to be there:** [ | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/meet-george-clooney/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zipCode=20112&/)
Thanks! You deserve this -- you’re the best!!

-Robby

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 3/16/16 at 12:00 a.m. (EST) and 3/31/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting “CLOONEY” to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from the campaign. Msg&data; rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to meet the Clooneys and the Clintons as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the event and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2150). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUwMzYzODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNTgxOTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Toomey spending big as polls narrow
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583d4/2794556461/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Last week, public polling showed me **within the margin of error of Sen. Toomey - almost three times closer than my primary opponent!** This week, with the polls narrowing, Toomey is actually spending $700,000 on 2 TV ads to begin to hide his record! _In ad #1_ , Toomey touts his vote for a background check bill - even though **Toomey also voted that same day against making gun trafficking a federal felony, against reinstating the assault weapons ban and for high capacity magazines** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583d3/2794556461/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0322FBb1")
---
_In ad #2_ , Toomey claims he supports "hard working law enforcement families" - **even though he voted 3 times to end $1 billion in law enforcement grants, from training programs to armored vests.**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583d2/2794556461/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0322FBb2")
---
Peter, let's not forget that **Pat Toomey is the guy who bragged that his "idea of gun control is a steady aim."**
[We will win against Sen. Toomey...please contribute now to ensure we do - by first winning the primary, which we lead by double digits!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583d1/2794556461/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0322FBp1")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583d0/2794556461/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0322FBb3")
---
Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583df/2794556461/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583de/2794556461/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583dd/2794556461/VEsO/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17194dd/3476a20e/c615144/274583dc/2794556461/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: Defeat the GOP
subject: "once unthinkable possibility" (NY Times)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/381587825407033344/-2237985549593870336?refcode=e20160322&refcode2=e20160322nd&amount=25)
---
Friend --

It's been weeks since Pat Toomey and Senate Republicans doubled down and refused to do their job and hold a hearing on Judge Merrick Garland's nomination to the Supreme Court.

Now, the _New York Times_ warns that the GOP's partisan politics raises "a once unthinkable possibility: **Presidents may no longer be confident of filling a Supreme Court vacancy unless their party controls the Senate. "**

[**We 're counting on your urgent support RIGHT NOW to defeat Pat Toomey, turn the Senate back to blue, and end the GOP obstruction in Washington. RUSH $5 or whatever you can to elect Katie >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/381587825407033344/-2237985549593870336?refcode=e20160322&refcode2=e20160322nd&amount=25)

Toomey is more vulnerable than ever before.

Last week, Toomey sent an urgent email to his supporters asking for help because our campaign could defeat him. **And just last night, he launched a new ad buy in Pennsylvania to distract voters from his refusal to consider, vote on, or _even meet_ President Obama's Supreme Court nominee.**

[**Let 's show Pat Toomey that he's right to be worried about our grassroots strength: Make an immediate donation to Katie today to defeat Pat Toomey and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/381587825407033344/-2237985549593870336?refcode=e20160322&refcode2=e20160322nd&amount=25)

With your support, we can reclaim our Democratic majority in the Senate and get Washington back to work.

Thank you,

Defeat the GOP
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/381587825407033344/-2237985549593870336?refcode=e20160322&refcode2=e20160322nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: An important victory
body:
#
This is a big deal, sisters and brothers. Yesterday afternoon, we received the final results from another Democratic primary contest:
**Democrats Abroad Results -March 21, 2016**
Sanders: 69% (nine delegates)
Clinton: 31% (four delegates)
Here's why this result is important: **we netted more delegates from the Democrats Abroad voting than Hillary Clinton netted with her narrow victories in Illinois, Massachusetts, and Missouri combined.**
This is the result we needed. Now we wait to hear from Arizona, Idaho, and Utah later tonight, where we should do well. But we also have to focus on what's next, and that is the CRITICAL caucus in Washington on Saturday.
[**Your $3 contribution today will ensure we have what we need to win Washington State 's caucus this Saturday. We need a good margin there, and your contribution could make the difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-democrats-abroad?refcode=em160322-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-democrats-abroad?refcode=em160322-full")
We've said all along that March 15th would be the high-water mark for Hillary Clinton's campaign. Now the map shifts in our favor, and we're going to begin clawing back delegates in state after state until we capture the lead on June 7th. But that will only happen if we continue to stand together.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-democrats-abroad?refcode=em160322-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-democrats-abroad?refcode=em160322-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: comes down to results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
> We wanted you to know, friend.
>
> On Friday we had the first public debate which the Washington Post highlighted as a "moment of clarity" underscoring Chris's "undeniable record" as "a key negotiator in efforts to break logjams in the House" and someone who "would play a similar role in the Senate on issues where bipartisan compromise may be possible, such as criminal justice reform."
>
> And we know that Chris is the only candidate in this race with a record of actually taking on Wall Street special interests -- not just talking about it. He stopped big banks who were making outrageous profits from the student loan program and he has introduced legislation that ends sweetheart deals that benefit corporate special interests at the expense of everyday people.
>
> [**Marylanders want and deserve their next Senator to be someone who is able to deliver real results for the people of our state and our country.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cbf/70cdc2ba/47cbdce3/3968f9c/3318837795/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-washpo-post-debate?refcode=em32216&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Marylanders+want+and+deserve+their+next+&utm_campaign=em32216&source=em32216")
>
> That's what this election is about -- the everyday people who are looking for solutions and want to move forward to address the challenges we face.
>
> Because of you we can get our message out to voters across our state.**[Can you help us keep the momentum going by making a contribution of any size today?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cbf/70cdc2ba/47cbdce3/3968f9d/3318837795/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-washpo-post-debate?refcode=em32216&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+help+us+keep+the+momentum+going+&utm_campaign=em32216&source=em32216") **
>
> Thanks for everything you do.
>
> Team Van Hollen
> | ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cbf/70cdc2ba/47cbdce3/3968f9a/3318837795/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-washpo-post-debate?refcode=em32216&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em32216&source=em32216")****
> ---
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cbf/70cdc2ba/47cbdce3/3968f9b/3318837795/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em32216&source=em32216") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 3/16/16 at 12:00 a.m. (EST) and 3/31/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting “CLOONEY” to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from the campaign. Msg&data; rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to meet the Clooneys and the Clintons as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the event and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2150). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUwNDgyMzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYzNzY5MjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
